title: Replace OSM iframe with Leaflet.js for dynamic zoom control
description: Replace OSM iframe with Leaflet.js. Map starts zoomed out showing entire city, then auto-zooms in to pin location on page load. Map is non-interactive (no user controls). Preserve spinning animation, vignette overlay, and APU design system.

title: Install Leaflet dependency and configure build
description: Install leaflet and @types/leaflet packages using bun

title: Create LeafletMap Astro component with zoom controls
description: Create LeafletMap.astro component: non-interactive map, auto-zoom from zoom 10 (city view) to zoom 16 (pin location) on load using flyTo animation. No zoom controls, no pan, scrollWheelZoom disabled, dragging disabled, touchZoom disabled, doubleClickZoom disabled. Center on APU campus pin [-7.071300, 110.362306]. Use custom APU pin marker. Component accepts zoomStart, zoomEnd, zoomDuration props.

title: Refactor AnchorCampusSectionAPU to use LeafletMap component
description: Refactor AnchorCampusSectionAPU.astro: replace iframe with LeafletMap component. Remove all OSM bbox calculation code. Keep spinning animation on map container. Keep vignette overlay. Keep APU pin image overlay. Keep text zone with gradient. Pass zoomStart=10, zoomEnd=16, zoomDuration=4000 to LeafletMap.

title: Add Leaflet CSS and custom map styles to global CSS
description: Add Leaflet CSS import and custom map styles: disable default Leaflet controls, ensure map respects pointer-events and overflow hidden, style map tiles to match APU aesthetic (saturate/contrast filters), add transition timing for flyTo animation.

title: Build verification and testing
description: Build and verify: run bun run build, check for errors, verify map auto-zooms on load, confirm no user interaction possible, check visual fidelity matches original design.
